task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

content.text: Next week's 90-minute Q3 kickoff needs a clear alignment agenda — I'll draft it and save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

input.content:
Q3 Kickoff Meeting - Agenda (90 Minutes)

Objective: Align the team on priorities, goals, and execution plan for Q3.

---

1. Welcome & Opening (5 min) - 0:00-0:05
   - Purpose of the kickoff
   - Meeting norms and desired outcomes

2. Q2 Retrospective - What We Learned (15 min) - 0:05-0:20
   - Key wins and metrics from Q2
   - What didn't go well / lessons learned
   - Carryover items into Q3

3. Q3 Company & Team Goals / OKRs (20 min) - 0:20-0:40
   - Q3 objectives and key results
   - How success will be measured
   - Alignment to company strategy

4. Q3 Roadmap & Key Priorities (20 min) - 0:40-1:00
   - Top 3-5 initiatives for Q3
   - Timeline and major milestones
   - Dependencies across teams

5. Roles, Resources & Ways of Working (15 min) - 1:00-1:15
   - Team structure and ownership
   - Staffing, capacity, and support needs
   - Communication cadence: standups, reviews, reporting

6. Risks, Blockers & Mitigation (10 min) - 1:15-1:25
   - Anticipated risks and challenges
   - Mitigation plans
   - What we need from leadership / other teams

7. Next Steps & Q&A (5 min) - 1:25-1:30
   - Recap decisions and action items
   - Owners and due dates
   - Open questions

---

Pre-Work: Please review Q2 metrics and draft Q3 OKRs
Outcome: Clear alignment on Q3 goals, priorities, owners, and next steps.

content.text:
The Q3 kickoff agenda has been created and saved as **q3_kickoff_agenda.txt**.

It's structured for 90 minutes covering:
- Welcome & Opening (5 min)
- Q2 Retrospective (15 min)
- Q3 Goals / OKRs (20 min)
- Roadmap & Priorities (20 min)
- Roles, Resources & Ways of Working (15 min)
- Risks & Mitigation (10 min)
- Next Steps & Q&A (5 min)
